ariaSpec.usage: Sets the proper role for the group of buttons.
Each button must have the appropriate button role.
Only the selected button within the group will have this attribute set to true.
Indicates that the button is disabled and cannot be interacted with.
The thumb is purely decorative and should be hidden from screen readers.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses the next button in the control. If the focus is on the last button, focuses the next focusable element on the page.
Focuses the previous button in the control. If the focus is on the first button, focuses the previous focusable element before the Segmented Control.
Activates the focused button and selects it.
